title: (Perm) SAP SuccessFactors Analyst #IFL
description:
• Provide end-to-end support for the implementation and ongoing operation of SAP SuccessFactors across all modules in the South Asia region.

  • Lead the effective rollout, optimization, and continuous maintenance of HR systems to ensure business alignment and reliability.

  • Identify and drive opportunities to automate processes, streamline workflows, and enhance data accuracy and integrity within SuccessFactors.

  • Monitor and report on the adoption of SuccessFactors modules across South Asia, including user engagement, completion of HR transactions, and usage of self-service capabilities.

  • Proactively assess system performance, pinpoint improvement areas, and implement enhancements to improve efficiency and overall user experience.

  • Track and measure the quality and timeliness of issue resolution for system incidents and user inquiries, maintaining high levels of customer satisfaction.

  • Assess the effectiveness of training programs and learning materials to support successful user onboarding and ongoing competency development.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Computer Engineering, System Analysis, or a related discipline.

  • Proven experience in implementing and supporting SAP SuccessFactors modules, including Employee Central, Performance Management, Learning Management, Recruitment, Onboarding, and other core functionalities.

  • Strong knowledge of HR system configuration, including data models, workflows, role-based permissions, and integrations to meet business needs.

  • Ability to analyze HR data, develop reports and dashboards, and translate insights into actionable recommendations for process improvement.

  • Demonstrated experience providing technical support to end-users, troubleshooting system issues, and maintaining platform stability and performance.

  • Solid understanding of HR data privacy regulations and industry best practices to ensure data security, integrity, and regulatory compliance.

  • Experience managing assigned projects, delivering outcomes on schedule, following project plans, and effectively coordinating with stakeholders.

  • Capability to support change management initiatives, including user training, communication, requirements gathering, and driving successful adoption of HR systems.

Interested applicants, please Email, fabianling@recruitexpress.com.sg

Fabian Ling Tuong Liing

R25129353

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA Licence No: 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
